content_body: We came, we relaxed, we had a GREAT time! No better way to celebrate my besties 40th birthday! Many memories were made on this trip. It's great to be able to spend quality time with a special group of females. The scenery was beautiful! We came right in and made it our home away from home. We even tackled our fear of heights..( well some of us did)..  Thanks for providing us a place to have such a wonderful time away from home.
title: Girls Trip to the Blue Ridge Mountains
